About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long AGX and TRT are displaying exceptional long-term momentum characteristics, with AGX ranking #1 overall with a score of 94.6. AGX shows extraordinarily consistent returns across all timeframes, with 10-year returns of 1,676% and a clean momentum signal (0.33) backed by all four moving averages in bullish alignment; its 5-year outperformance versus SPY stands at 1,363%, suggesting sustained secular strength. TRT presents a different momentum profile with more volatile ratio progression—its 3-month return of 155% is dramatic, but the 5-year-to-1-year ratio of 0.87 indicates decelerating growth over longer periods despite exceptional 1-year returns of 502%. Both securities are passing most ratio quality checks and trading above all key moving averages, though AGX's steadier momentum acceleration and deeper historical strength (score_depth of 100) position it as the more structurally validated long-term momentum candidate on today's data.
